user_feedback: can you make the levels more interesting, right now they are all very easy to win, and also all of the objects have this distracitng animation, can you make it more minimal
analysis:
- Issue identified: Levels are too easy/trivial, and the wobble animation on entities is distracting.
- Files affected: `entities.js`, `levels.js`
- Changes needed:
  - In `entities.js`: Significantly reduce the amplitude of the wobble/scale animation in `render()` to make it minimal.
  - In `levels.js`: Redesign the three levels to introduce basic puzzle mechanics (fixing a broken rule, breaking a blocking rule, and transforming an object) instead of simple walking tasks.
